title: Comfort Ironing Water Fresh Sky Intense Vaporesse Deionised Water Gives Your Laundry a Clean, Fresh and Uplifting Fragrance Prevents Limscale for Easy Ironing 1 Litre (Buy 4)
features: At Comfort: Comfort knows you love your clothes. They love clothes too, and they want to help you care for them. That’s why they've developed Comfort Ironing Water, A secret to easy ironing, helping you glide effortlessly over creases with its Anti-static formula, which helps ironed clothes feel more comfortable to wear. Use Comfort Intense Vaporesse Fresh Sky Ironing Water together with Comfort Intense Fabric Conditioner for clean and fresh laundry.

Fresh Sky Ironing Water: Do you want your clothes refreshed and smelling like fresh laundry? Take out your ironing board and use Comfort Intense Vaporesse Fresh Sky Ironing Water. Used in your iron instead of normal water, Comfort Intense Vaporesse helps you effortlessly glide over creases for easy ironing and smooth clothes that hang better.

Limescale Protection: This water makes ironing more enjoyable and even protects your iron by preventing limescale. Thanks to its special formula, you can use it with all kinds of irons, even with a travel iron. Enjoy easier ironing thanks to an anti-static formula that helps reduce creases and make your ironed clothes more comfortable to wear.

Perfect For: It brings a delightful fresh-air fragrance to your ironing. Now you'll be able to have that fresh smoothness for even longer. Use it on all your ironing for an uplifting fragrance and smooth clothes that look and feel great. With Comfort Intense Vaporesse Fresh Sky Ironing Water in your cupboard, ironing will never be the same again.

How to Use: Simply pour Comfort Ironing Water directly into the water reservoir of your steam iron and you’re ready to go. First-time use: Before using Comfort iron water for the first time, it’s important to descale your iron to avoid limescale deposits. Pair it up with Comfort’s amazing range of fabric conditioners and open the door to a world of delightfully soft clothes and wonderful fragrances.
